pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 16: PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp" creates synthetic Android project at this location; export_result.sh line 11 uses same path

Task description specifies keystore path '~/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp/release-keystore.jks'; export_result.sh line 20 KEYSTORE_PATH="$PROJECT_DIR/release-keystore.jks"; Android standard per https://developer.android.com/studio/publish/app-signing and https://sreyas.com/blog/java-keystore-jks-for-android-app-signing/
Task description explicitly states 'Key Alias: 'weather-release-key''; verifier.py line 44 expects this value; conventional naming for Android release signing keys

Task description explicitly states 'CN='Weather App Team'' in certificate details; verifier.py line 45 expects this value; CN (Common Name) is standard X.500 distinguished name component per https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/zos/2.2.0?topic=SSLTBW_2.2.0/com.ibm.tcp.ipsec.ipsec.help.doc/com/ibm/tcp/ipsec/nss/NssImageServerPs.RB_X500.htm and RFC 1779

Task description explicitly states 'O='CloudView Inc'' in certificate details; verifier.py line 46 expects this value; O (Organization) is standard X.500 distinguished name component per https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc1779 and https://ldapwiki.com/wiki/Wiki.jsp?page=Distinguished+Names

export_result.sh line 61: APK_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/app/build/outputs/apk/release"; task description step 4 mentions 'Build a signed release APK'; standard Gradle Android build output directory per https://developer.android.com/build and https://minimum-viable-product.github.io/marshmallow-docs/tools/building/building-cmdline.html

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic Android app release signing exercise for 'WeatherApp' at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp. The agent must generate a Java KeyStore (JKS) file named 'release-keystore.jks' with key alias 'weather-release-key' and certificate distinguished name CN='Weather App Team', O='CloudView Inc'. All directory and file paths, certificate fields, and naming conventions follow Android development standards: .jks is the standard Java KeyStore format for Android signing, the metadata alias is typical for release keys, CN and O are standard X.500 certificate components, and app/build/outputs/apk/release is the standard Gradle location for release APK outputs. The project is entirely synthetic and created from scratch by setup_task.sh.
